prompt: A precise botanical illustration of a 'Decision Tree' plant, executed in the authentic Art Nouveau style of the 1890s. The composition uses a central 'Whiplash' vine that bifurcates upward into binary splits. Each split is marked by a small, stylized parchment label with elegant hand-lettered calligraphy. The terminal 'leaf nodes' are blooming lilies. Visual grammar: flat areas of sage green and terracotta, thick flowing ink outlines, no photographic shading, cream-colored aged paper background. Framed by a geometric ornamental arch. Highly detailed, scientific plate style.
tradition_approach: Applied the 'whiplash' line for branching logic and organic bifurcations. Used a muted, flat-color palette (sage, terracotta, ochre) and stylized hand-lettered cartouches to integrate machine learning parameters into a 19th-century scientific plate grammar.
